channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: This new prepaid carrier will literally pay you up to $20 per month to use your phone less
item.description: The new carrier Noble Wireless will pay you up to $20/mo per month for using less data thanks to a unique cashback system.

item.title: ‘The biggest losers in all of this are everyday people and civilians in conflict zones’: OpenAI is filling the gap left by Anthropic — but almost left in the same loopholes for mass domestic surveillance
item.description: OpenAI has signed a contract with the Pentagon, days after Anthropic's $200 million contract was severed.

item.title: Why Lord and Miller Adapted ‘Project Hail Mary’ Before Andy Weir’s Second Book
item.description: 'Project Hail Mary' directors Phil Lord and Chris Miller were previously attached to direct 'Artemis,' which came after Weir's 'The Martian.'

item.title: Pokémon Pokopia review: Possibly the most charming Pokémon game yet
item.description: One of the biggest issues with mainline Pokémon games is that you're often so focused on catching, battling and trying to be the very best that you don't have time to stop and smell the flowers. But in Pokémon Pokopia, you're rewarded for doing just that while building a loving community of friendly monsters. The game is one part Animal Crossing and one part Dragon Quest Builders sprinkled with a touch of Minecraft and Stardew Valley. he result might be one of the coziest, most wholesome life sims on the market.Setup and gameplayIn Pokopia, you play as a Ditto, who has awakened to a world wher...

item.title: -60 % pour ce lot de quatre trackers Samsung avec cette réduction XXL d’Amazon
item.description: Si le SmartTag 2 possède de nombreuses qualités comme sa localisation reposant sur le Galaxy Find Network, la partie la plus intéressante est cette réduction de 75 euros pour quatre trackers proposée par Amazon.

item.title: These Beats Headphones We Like Are $150 Off
item.description: Save a chunk of change on the Beats Studio Pro over-ear headphones.

item.title: When AI Companies Go to War, Safety Gets Left Behind
item.description: We were promised AI regulation and a race to the top. Now, we’re arguing about killer robots.

item.title: Anthropic’s Pentagon deal is a cautionary tale for startups chasing federal contracts
item.description: The Pentagon has officially designated Anthropic a supply-chain risk after the two failed to agree on how much control the military should have over its AI models, including its use in autonomous weapons and mass domestic surveillance. As Anthropic’s $200 million contract fell apart, the DoD turned to OpenAI instead, which accepted and then watched ChatGPT uninstalls surge 295%. As the stakes keep rising, the question remains: how much unrestricted […]...

item.title: 9 Best Android Phones of 2026, Tested and Reviewed
item.description: Shopping for a phone can be an ordeal. That’s why we’ve tested almost every Android phone, from the smartest to the cheapest—even phones that fold—to find the ones worth your money.

item.title: Claude’s consumer growth surge continues after Pentagon deal debacle
item.description: Claude's app is now seeing more new installs than ChatGPT and is growing its daily active users.

item.title: India PC shipments surpass pandemic peak as first-time users upgrade
item.description: Pandemic-driven lockdowns exposed many people in India to PCs for the first time, expanding the country's PC userbase and creating demand for upgrades as those devices age.

item.title: SEC Settles Case Against Investor in Trump-Linked Crypto Projects Amid Pay-to-Play Allegations
item.description: Justin Sun has been eager to promote crypto offerings related to the President.

item.title: Pedro Pascal Loves Why His Helmet Comes Off in ‘The Mandalorian and Grogu’
item.description: 'The Last of Us' and 'Fantastic Four' star apparently does a lot more in the upcoming 'Star Wars' movie.

item.title: Pentagon Reportedly Used Microsoft Workaround to Test OpenAI Models, Despite Ban
item.description: The Defense Department alledgedly experimented with OpenAI models through Microsoft even when the company’s policies prohibited military use.

item.title: The price to pay — This is why 400+ scientists are calling for a halt to mandatory age verification
item.description: The internet gets age-gated, changing how we interact with our favorite apps and websites. While the benefits aren't clear yet, we are losing control of our privacy. Here's what's at stake.

item.title: Google opens the door to OpenClaw and other AI agents with new release
item.description: OpenClaw and other AI agents now have an official means to integrate with Google Workspace.

item.title: Trump claimed Tylenol is linked to autism. Emergency room data just revealed a hard truth about the anti-painkiller crusade
item.description: A new report shows the troubling medical impact of the president’s statements. Last September, President Donald Trump took the stage at a White House press conference to give America some (completely unfounded) medical advice.

item.title: Idéal pour le travail nomade, ce pack Samsung avec une Galaxy Tab A11+ et un clavier ne dépasse pas 250 €
item.description: Lancée l'an dernier, la Samsung Galaxy Tab A11+ est une tablette tactile abordable qui peut devenir une machine de travail portable très pratique avec un clavier Bluetooth. Ça tombe bien, les deux produits sont actuellement présents dans un pack à 249,99 euros au lieu de 369,99 euros chez Rakuten.

item.title: Hackers exploiting WordPress membership plugin bug to create admin accounts
item.description: A popular WordPress plugin can be abused to take over websites - with thousands of sites reportedly vulnerable.

item.title: Embrace the release of Marathon by adding the Limited Edition DualSense controller to your setup
item.description: I might not play the game loads myself, but the Marathon Limited Edition DualSense looks pretty slick to me, and you can add it to your setup right now.

item.title: Trump and RFK Jr. Told Pregnant Women to Stop Using Tylenol. It’s Happening
item.description: Acetaminophen use among pregnant women in the ER dropped following the White House's autism announcement last September.

item.title: Vous aimez les Galaxy S équipés de puces Snapdragon ? Profitez-en car cela pourrait ne pas durer
item.description: Les utilisateurs de smartphones Samsung apprécient généralement les performances des processeurs Qualcomm. Le géant sud-coréen a pourtant un tout autre plan en tête et souhaite généraliser ses propres puces sur l'ensemble de ses futurs appareils.

item.title: You can already save up to $50 on the new M4 iPad Air
item.description: In case you missed it, Apple announced a host of new devices this week, including both a new phone and a cheaper laptop. It also unveiled the M4-powered iPad Air, which is already receiving a preorder discount ahead of its March 11th debut. Right now, the 128GB / Wi-Fi model is available at Amazon, Best […]

item.title: Comment Proton Mail a aidé le FBI à démasquer un manifestant, abonné à sa messagerie chiffrée
item.description: Pour une entreprise qui vante ses outils en ligne pour protéger ses données personnelles, c'est une très mauvaise publicité. Proton Mail, le service de messagerie chiffrée, a permis au FBI de démasquer un de ses utilisateurs, membre du mouvement Stop Cop City à Atlanta.

item.title: Test TP-Link Tapo C665G Kit : autonomie infinie et 4K sans Wi-Fi
item.description: TP-Link présente une nouvelle caméra Wi-Fi et 4G, entièrement autonome grâce à un panneau solaire et une batterie intégrée. Elle profite au passage de fonctionnalités d’IA gratuites et pourrait bien être la caméra ultime pour les lieux sans Wi-Fi.

item.title: Samsung exec says ‘vibe coding is very interesting, and something we’re looking into’ as an option on Galaxy phones in the future
item.description: Wish you could easily vibe code phone apps on your Samsung Galaxy S26? It’s ‘Something we’re looking into,’ says Samsung exec.

item.title: Nintendo has revealed a new poster for The Super Mario Galaxy Movie ahead of its final trailer — and it confirms two more villains will show up
item.description: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie's latest poster has revealed two more villains will appear in the animated film.

item.title: This AI company built an AI-proof recruitment process—and just got acquired for $1.1 billion
item.description: Sana Labs helps companies deploy AI assistants, but when it comes to its own hiring, it’s outsmarted the growing AI-on-AI cat-and-mouse game between recruiters and job candidates. If you’re looking for a job or hiring, the question is no longer whether AI is involved—but how aggressively you’re using it.

item.title: Gap stock sinks after earnings. The real story may be what happened to 800 stores
item.description: Severe winter storms forced temporary closures at hundreds of Gap Inc. locations during the fourth quarter, a disruption the retailer says weighed on results and investor sentiment. Gap stock is plummeting this morning in early trading after the company reported its fourth-quarter results after the bell yesterday. As of this writing, shares of Gap Inc. (NYSE: GAP) are down more than 12%, and its recent temporary store closures are partly to blame for that. Here’s what you need to know....

item.title: How to watch Scotland vs. France in the 2026 Six Nations online for free
item.description: Watch the Six Nations for free. Live stream Scotland vs. France in the 2026 Six Nations for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: How to watch Wolves vs. Liverpool in the FA Cup online for free
item.description: How to watch FA Cup for free. Live stream Wolves vs. Liverpool in the FA Cup for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Iranians threatened with legal action for using VPNs to bypass internet blocks — here's everything we know
item.description: Iranian authorities are sending SMS warnings to citizens who successfully bypass the country's near-total internet blackout, threatening prosecution for those using VPNs or Starlink to access the global web.

item.title: Save over $150 on the first gen Bose QuietComfort Ultra headphones at Amazon
item.description: As of March 6, get the first gen Bose QuietComfort headphones for just $278.99 and save over $150 — nearly back to their lowest price ever.
